blocks.text: Glimt humbled Inter Milan — now no one in Europe wants to draw them
200,000 new followers overnight. "I don't think anyone wants to draw us," said Glimt's star ahead of the Champions League draw. Norway's greatest European club night is still reverberating.
🎿 Fri 16:10 — Biathlon Men's 20km Individual Kontiolahti: Bø, Lægreid and Christiansen in the hunt
